label: Keeper's Sleep Niche
description: Keeper's Sleep Niche forms the inner sleeping recess of Ashlight Keeper's Quarters, partitioned by a riveted sheet-metal half-wall and a hanging gasketed curtain to conserve heat. A narrow cot is bolted to the basalt-set floor beside built-in lockers, all surfaces finished in soot-dark timber and scuffed metal made for washdown. Violet-glass light leaks through a slitted sconce, staining the enclosure in bruise-colored hues that echo Vespera Tertius’ auroral glare. Copper grounding straps and ceiling chains continue through the niche, terminating at a grated sump that channels both moisture and static to the canteen’s foundations.
